'''鈭歜-n-t''' ('''kabanat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:stage|stage]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-n-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stage|stage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-n-t
|-
! Lemma
| kabanat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibanat|thibanat]] || [[word:jibanat|jibanat]] || [[word:shibanat|shibanat]] || [[word:kibanat|kibanat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubanat|thuthubanat]] || [[word:jujubanat|jujubanat]] || [[word:shushubanat|shushubanat]] || [[word:kukubanat|kukubanat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubanat|thubanat]] || [[word:jubanat|jubanat]] || [[word:shubanat|shubanat]] || [[word:kubanat|kubanat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubanat|thubanat]] || [[word:jubanat|jubanat]] || [[word:shubanat|shubanat]] || [[word:kubanat|kubanat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebanat|thebanat]] || [[word:jebanat|jebanat]] || [[word:shebanat|shebanat]] || [[word:kebanat|kebanat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobanat|thothobanat]] || [[word:jojobanat|jojobanat]] || [[word:shoshobanat|shoshobanat]] || [[word:kokobanat|kokobanat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobanat|thobanat]] || [[word:jobanat|jobanat]] || [[word:shobanat|shobanat]] || [[word:kobanat|kobanat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobanat|thobanat]] || [[word:jobanat|jobanat]] || [[word:shobanat|shobanat]] || [[word:kobanat|kobanat]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:banat|banat]] || [[word:banat|banat]] || [[word:banat|banat]] || [[word:banat|banat]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:banat|banat]] || [[word:banat|banat]] || [[word:banat|banat]] || [[word:banat|banat]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:banat|banat]] || [[word:banat|banat]] || [[word:banat|banat]] || [[word:banat|banat]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:banat|banat]] || [[word:banat|banat]] || [[word:banat|banat]] || [[word:banat|banat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙banat|th忙banat]] || [[word:j忙banat|j忙banat]] || [[word:sh忙banat|sh忙banat]] || [[word:k忙banat|k忙banat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabanat|thathabanat]] || [[word:jajabanat|jajabanat]] || [[word:shashabanat|shashabanat]] || [[word:kakabanat|kakabanat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabanat|thabanat]] || [[word:jabanat|jabanat]] || [[word:shabanat|shabanat]] || [[word:kabanat|kabanat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabanat|thabanat]] || [[word:jabanat|jabanat]] || [[word:shabanat|shabanat]] || [[word:kabanat|kabanat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabanat|shabanat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabanat|goshabanat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabanat|gokishabanat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabanatn眉|shabanatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabanatnkn眉|goshabanatnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabanatn眉|gokishabanatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabanatsh毛|shabanatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabanatnksh毛|goshabanatnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabanatsh毛|gokishabanatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabanatro|shabanatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabanatnkro|goshabanatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabanatro|gokishabanatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabanatmu|shabanatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabanatnkmu|goshabanatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabanatmu|gokishabanatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabanatsher|shabanatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabanatnksher|goshabanatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabanatsher|gokishabanatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabanatng|shabanatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabanatnkng|goshabanatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabanatng|gokishabanatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabanatya|shabanatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabanatnkya|goshabanatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabanatya|gokishabanatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabanatyam|shabanatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabanatnkyam|goshabanatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabanatyam|gokishabanatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabanatn眉sh毛|shabanatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabanatnkn眉sh毛|goshabanatnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabanatn眉sh毛|gokishabanatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabanatn眉ro|shabanatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabanatnkn眉ro|goshabanatnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabanatn眉ro|gokishabanatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabanatn眉mu|shabanatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabanatnkn眉mu|goshabanatnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabanatn眉mu|gokishabanatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabanatsh毛n眉|shabanatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabanatnksh毛n眉|goshabanatnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabanatsh毛n眉|gokishabanatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabanatsh毛ro|shabanatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabanatnksh毛ro|goshabanatnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabanatsh毛ro|gokishabanatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabanatsh毛mu|shabanatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabanatnksh毛mu|goshabanatnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabanatsh毛mu|gokishabanatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabanatron眉|shabanatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabanatnkron眉|goshabanatnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabanatron眉|gokishabanatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabanatrosh毛|shabanatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabanatnkrosh毛|goshabanatnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabanatrosh毛|gokishabanatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabanatromu|shabanatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabanatnkromu|goshabanatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabanatromu|gokishabanatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabanatmun眉|shabanatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabanatnkmun眉|goshabanatnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabanatmun眉|gokishabanatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabanatmush毛|shabanatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabanatnkmush毛|goshabanatnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabanatmush毛|gokishabanatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabanatmuro|shabanatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabanatnkmuro|goshabanatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabanatmuro|gokishabanatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
